scripts.docs:typedoc: (cd docs && typedoc --options typedoc.typeorm-seeder.json && typedoc --options typedoc.nest-typeorm-seeder.json && typedoc --options typedoc.mikroorm-seeder.json && typedoc --options typedoc.nest-mikroorm-seeder.json)
scripts.docs:dev: pnpm run docs:typedoc && vitepress dev docs
scripts.docs:build: pnpm run docs:typedoc && vitepress build docs
